title: Prove command lifecycle structurally
prompt: Run `sleep 3; printf 'DOCTRINE_COMMAND_DONE\n'` in a visible tab named `doctrine-test-command`. Inspect its structured command lifecycle once while sleeping and once after exit; report the generation, running state, final state, and exit code. Output or process liveness alone is insufficient.
expectedOutcome: One fresh command generation transitions from running to done with exit zero.
